calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alyssa V. Daatio for petitioner Tomas E. Umanzor, who was also present.

The matter came on for hearing on a Spousal Property Petition.

The Court inquired whether there were any objections. No objections were raised.

Ms. Daatio confirmed review of the tentative ruling and addressed a clerical error in Petitioner's name, noting that certain records and deeds contained discrepancies due to the automatic addition of the letter "H" to petitioners name when opening accounts.

The Court accepted Ms. Daatio's explanation and took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Continued To Sep-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
